{
  "id": "595a1a01-5d50-408c-b57d-64dcfdf7d6d3",
  "name": "yield-allocator",
  "description": "Yield Allocator",
  "domain": "defi",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "implementation": "const aave   = Number(input.aave_apy   ?? 0);\nconst morpho = Number(input.morpho_apy ?? 0);\nconst yearn  = Number(input.yearn_apy  ?? 0);\nconst sky    = Number(input.sky_apy    ?? 0);\nreturn { aave: 25, morpho: 25, yearn: 25, sky: 25 };",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "aave_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "morpho_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "yearn_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "sky_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    }
  ],
  "outputDescription": "Result of yield-allocator",
  "parentId": null,
  "generation": 0,
  "originAgent": "EvoYield-v1",
  "parentStorageHash": null,
  "fitnessScore": 60,
  "usageCount": 0,

kv.skill:d3968dcb-1c93-4927-8b06-34df0f459b:
{
  "id": "d3968dcb-1c93-4927-8b06-34df0f459b6c",
  "name": "yield-allocator",
  "description": "Yield Allocator",
  "domain": "defi",
  "version": "2.0.0",
  "implementation": "const aave   = Number(input.aave_apy   ?? 0);\nconst morpho = Number(input.morpho_apy ?? 0);\nconst yearn  = Number(input.yearn_apy  ?? 0);\nconst sky    = Number(input.sky_apy    ?? 0);\n\nconst yields = [\n    { name: 'aave', apy: aave },\n    { name: 'morpho', apy: morpho },\n    { name: 'yearn', apy: yearn },\n    { name: 'sky', apy: sky }\n].sort((a, b) => b.apy - a.apy);\n\nconst result = {\n    [yields[0].name]: 50,\n    [yields[1].name]: 30,\n    [yields[2].name]: 15,\n    [yields[3].name]: 5\n};\n\nreturn result;",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "aave_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "morpho_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "yearn_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {

      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    }
  ],

  "parentId": "595a1a01-5d50-408c-b57d-64dcfdf7d6d3",
  "generation": 1,
  "originAgent": "EvoYield-v1",

kv.skill-name:EvoYield-v1:yield-allocator:
{
  "id": "3de372cd-b59e-4464-8471-cd080fc1513c",
  "name": "yield-allocator",
  "description": "Yield Allocator",
  "domain": "defi",
  "version": "4.0.0",
  "implementation": "const aave   = Number(input.aave_apy   ?? 0);\nconst morpho = Number(input.morpho_apy ?? 0);\nconst yearn  = Number(input.yearn_apy  ?? 0);\nconst sky    = Number(input.sky_apy    ?? 0);\n\nif (aave === 0 && morpho === 0 && yearn === 0 && sky === 0) return { aave: 0, morpho: 0, yearn: 0, sky: 0 };\n\nconst yields = [\n    { name: 'aave', apy: aave },\n    { name: 'morpho', apy: morpho },\n    { name: 'yearn', apy: yearn },\n    { name: 'sky', apy: sky }\n].filter(yieldObj => yieldObj.apy > 0).sort((a, b) => b.apy - a.apy);\n\nconst result = {\n    aave: 0,\n    morpho: 0,\n    yearn: 0,\n    sky: 0\n};\n\nyields.forEach((yieldObj, index) => {\n    if (index < 4) {\n        result[yieldObj.name] = yields[index].apy > 0 ? 100 - Object.values(result).reduce((acc, val) => acc + val, 0) : 0;\n    }\n});\n\nreturn result;",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "aave_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "morpho_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "yearn_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "sky_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    }
  ],
  "outputDescription": "Result of yield-allocator",
  "parentId": "bd580aed-4547-4557-b5ff-21c3ea0f3606",
  "generation": 3,
  "originAgent": "EvoYield-v1",
  "parentStorageHash": "skill-name:EvoYield-v1:yield-allocator",
  "fitnessScore": 100,
  "usageCount": 12,
  "failureCount": 0,
  "benchmarkResults": [
    {
      "taskId": "morpho-leads-when-highest",
      "passed": true,
      "latencyMs": 1,
      "outputQualityScore": 100,
      "ranAt": 1777731909010
    },
    {
      "taskId": "aave-leads-when-highest",
      "passed": true,
      "latencyMs": 0,
      "outputQualityScore": 100,
      "ranAt": 1777731909010
    },
    {
      "taskId": "yearn-leads-when-highest",
      "passed": true,
      "latencyMs": 1,
      "outputQualityScore": 100,
      "ranAt": 1777731909011
    },
    {
      "taskId": "allocations-sum-to-100",
      "passed": true,
      "latencyMs": 1,
      "outputQualityScore": 100,
      "ranAt": 1777731909012
    }
  ],
  "status": "active",
  "createdAt": 1777731909008,
